allow: PowerShell($j = Get-Content "D:\\code\\biblequize\\apps\\api\\src\\main\\resources\\seed\\questions\\1corinthians_quiz.json" -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $j | ForEach-Object { $ve = if \($_.verseEnd\) { "-$\($_.verseEnd\)" } else { "" }; "$\($_.difficulty.PadRight\(6\)\) $\($_.chapter\):$\($_.verseStart\)$ve  $\($_.content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(60,$_.content.Length\)\)\)" })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "D:\\code\\biblequize\\apps\\api\\src\\main\\resources\\seed\\questions\\1corinthians_quiz.json" -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "VI book values:"; $j | Group-Object -Property book | ForEach-Object { "  '$\($_.Name\)' x$\($_.Count\)" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "VI tags first item examples:"; $j | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.tags -join ' | '\)" })

PowerShell($candidates = @\("python","py","python3"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { try { $v = & $c --version 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "$c -> $v"; break } } catch { Write-Output "$c not found" } })
